generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control actuator for dynamic occupancy-based lighting/HVAC adjustments in the Living Lab facility, configured via BIM for real-time tenant ID-based control logic integration"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart HVAC controller system modeled within BIM for bidirectional interaction with the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware, configured for temperature/humidity optimization algorithms"
]

instance SmartLightingSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Modular smart lighting system integrated with BIM for dynamic control policies (e.g., BOREALIS AI-driven lighting schedules), enabling real-time occupancy-based dimming/activation"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion detection sensor configured within BIM to capture real-time occupancy metrics (tenant IDs) for the Living Lab facility, providing live feedback to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensor embedded in BIM to monitor operational conditions (e.g., room temperature ranges), transmitting real-time data to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Relative humidity sensor integrated within BIM for operational monitoring, capturing humidity levels (0-100%) and transmitting to the DT for comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time energy meter sensor configured in BIM to track HVAC/lighting energy consumption patterns, providing granular operational data for predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataStream
]

instance MotionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion detection sensor within BIM for occupancy pattern analysis, enabling real-time tracking of tenant movement and activity levels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction data streams
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
    DTDFVocab:protocol EclipseHono
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    DTDFVocab:protocol EclipseHono
]

instance HumidityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
    DTDFVocab:protocol EclipseHono
]

instance EnergyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
    DTDFVocab:protocol EclipseHono
]

instance MotionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionSensor
    DTDFVocab:protocol EclipseHono
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unified BIM model containing static 3D geometry, spatial relationships, and enriched metadata (device IDs, endpoint addresses) for the Living Lab facility, serving as the semantic backbone of the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline
]

instance RuntimeBCSMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata extracted from Building Control Systems including sensor configurations, control logic definitions, and device endpoint addresses, automatically generated from BIM via model-driven transformations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMEnrichedModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OperationalDataRepository : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Centralized repository storing real-time operational data (temperature, humidity, occupancy, energy) from all sensors, synchronized with the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream, TemperatureDataStream, HumidityDataStream, EnergyDataStream, MotionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance ControlPolicyDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Dynamic database storing AI-driven control policies (e.g., BOREALIS optimization algorithms) that update parameters in real-time without redeployment, integrated with smart lighting/HVAC systems"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RuntimeBCSMetadata
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SmartLightingSystem, HVACController
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated MDE workflow that transforms BIM models into operational Digital Twin artifacts through model-driven transformations, including metadata extraction and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables EclipseHono, UnrealEngine5, StandardizedExtensionPoints
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time bidirectional communication middleware (Eclipse Hono) enabling seamless data exchange between physical building components and the Digital Twin via standardized protocols (Ditto)"
    DTDFVocab:enables OccupancyDataStream, TemperatureDataStream, HumidityDataStream, EnergyDataStream, MotionDataStream
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization platform (Unreal Engine 5) providing interactive Digital Twin visualization with real-time sensor data integration for operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables OperationalDataRepository
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular service integration framework with predefined extension points for adding custom Digital Twin services (e.g., AI control logic, IoT analytics) without redeployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomAIControlService, PredictiveOptimizationService
]

instance AutomatedModelValidation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Semantic validation system that performs clash detection and consistency checks between BIM models and Digital Twin artifacts before deployment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMEnrichedModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous operational monitoring service that provides real-time visualization of building metrics (occupancy, temperature, energy consumption) via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalInsightsDashboard
]

instance PredictiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "AI-driven predictive analytics service that optimizes building performance (lighting/HVAC) using historical data and real-time feedback for energy efficiency and comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendations, ComfortAdjustmentActions
]

instance CustomAIControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic control policy service implementing BOREALIS AI-driven automation that updates building parameters in real-time without requiring redeployment"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicLightingControl, AdaptiveHVACSettings
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D interactive visualization service providing immersive Digital Twin experience with real-time sensor data integration for building operators"
    DTDFVocab:provides Interactive3DModel
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OperationalInsightsDashboard : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard displaying occupancy patterns, energy consumption trends, and environmental metrics for operational decision-making"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendations : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics output recommending energy-saving measures (e.g., HVAC setpoint adjustments, lighting schedules) based on occupancy and environmental data"
]

instance ComfortAdjustmentActions : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated comfort adjustment actions triggered by predictive analytics (e.g., dynamic HVAC temperature adjustments, occupancy-based lighting control)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DynamicLightingControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting control policy that automatically adjusts brightness/dimming based on occupancy detection and AI-driven optimization algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveHVACSettings : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic HVAC control that automatically adjusts heating/cooling parameters based on real-time environmental data and predictive comfort models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Interactive3DModel : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of the building's Digital Twin with interactive controls for exploring operational metrics in real-time"
]

// C12: Environment/Component Hierarchy
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancyActuator, HVACController, SmartLightingSystem,
                OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor,
                EnergyConsumptionSensor, MotionSensor,
                BIMEnrichedModel, OperationalDataRepository,
                ControlPolicyDatabase, RealTimeMonitoringService,
                PredictiveOptimizationService, CustomAIControlService
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized BCS infrastructure integrating all building automation components (sensors, actuators, control logic) for unified Digital Twin interaction"
    base:contains HVACController, SmartLightingSystem, OccupancyActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facilitates **control signal transmission** from the DT back to the physical building infrastructure. The DT generates control outputs (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC optimizations) via standardized APIs integrated with Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware, enabling real-time adjustments to BCS. This bidirectional communication is critical for adaptive control strategies (e.g., reinforcement learning-based lighting optimization in BOREALIS), ensuring the DT dynamically influences operational behavior."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time (sub-second to near-real-time) time scale** for critical operational data synchronization. The DT ensures **low-latency bidirectional communication** between physical and virtual assets via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), enabling live updates of sensor data and control signals. The framework prioritizes **low-latency transformations** during model-driven deployment to minimize synchronization delays."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrates a **unified DT ecosystem** centered around a **centralized DT framework** that integrates multiple services (e.g., monitoring, control, analytics) via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The DT constellation includes:
  - A **BIM-based semantic backbone** for spatial and functional representation.
  - **Decentralized service modules** (e.g., lighting, HVAC, energy) managed via extension points.
  - **Real-time synchronization** between physical assets and virtual models, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire **building lifecycle**, from **design (ideal representation)** to **construction (manufacturing phase)** and **operation (as-built monitoring)**. The DT is deployed as a **dynamic, operational model** that evolves with physical changes (e.g., refurbishments) via automated model updates and runtime configuration management. The framework ensures compatibility with BIM standards across all phases, enabling seamless transitions between design, construction, and operational DTs."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensures **high fidelity and validity** through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** to evaluate alignment between physical and virtual models.
  - **Automated model validation** (e.g., clash detection) during deployment to minimize semantic drift.
  - **Runtime synchronization** via low-latency middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to maintain real-time coherence.
  The framework emphasizes **verification/validation mechanisms** (e.g., iterative testing with a Living Lab case study) to address uncertainty and errors in dynamic DT environments."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs bidirectional communication via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware, facilitating real-time data exchange using standardized protocols. The technical connection ensures low-latency synchronization between physical and virtual components, with no specific mention of MQTT or RESTful APIs in the documents. The architecture supports scalable deployment across heterogeneous networks."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed via an **automated, service-oriented pipeline** that integrates BIM models with middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and visualization tools (Unreal Engine). While the exact hosting environment (e.g., cloud vs. on-premise) is not specified, the framework emphasizes modularity and extensibility, allowing deployment on scalable infrastructure. The process is fully automated except for initial BIM modeling and device configuration."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration occurs through standardized extension points enabling modular service integration with external systems. The framework leverages BIM tools for interoperability with other AECO stakeholders, facilitating collaboration across disciplines (e.g., architects, engineers) while maintaining semantic coherence via BIM semantics."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but the framework assumes **data ownership by the PT owner** (e.g., building operator) while ensuring **compliance with privacy standards** (e.g., GDPR) through secure middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and anonymized data processing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to the following standards:
  - **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the semantic backbone for building representation.
  - **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for real-time data exchange and middleware integration.
  - **Unreal Engine 5** for visualization, though proprietary.
  - **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM) for interoperability, though no explicit mention of IFC or COBie in the provided context."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations are **not explicitly detailed** in the documents. The framework focuses on real-time data synchronization and interoperability but does not address cybersecurity protocols (e.g., TLS, access controls), remote operation risks, or safety protocols for human interactions with the physical building."
]
